name: Bailador Technology Investments Limited
analysis: BTI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.9500, stop A$0.9158, target A$1.0550 (3.07:1) — then trail it.
